style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura pulses gently around Voltrorb's form, casting shifting shadows that stretch and warp unnaturally across the ground. Slow-drifting mist particles swirl in cold, pale blue tendrils, while faint energy pulses glow dimly through its translucent body like flickering candlelight. Eerie purple luminescence illuminates the scene with a haunting, ghostly glow, casting distorted reflections in nearby still water. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
